chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2678 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 25.02.2025 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that learned trial Court has acquitted the applicant by way of compromise. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous, it is accordingly dismissed. So far as the surety furnished in the instant criminal bail application is concerned, the same is discharged and the office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety, upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
